glosses.ja: かみそり; 電気シェーバー

sentences.target: Mon rasoir est tombé dans l'évier.

translations.fr: Mon rasoir est tombé dans l'évier.
translations.en: My razor fell into the sink.
translations.es: Mi maquinilla de afeitar se cayó en el lavabo.
translations.de: Mein Rasierer ist ins Waschbecken gefallen.
translations.it: Il mio rasoio è caduto nel lavandino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的剃须刀掉进了洗手池。
translations.yue: 我嘅剃鬚刀跌咗入洗手盆。
translations.pt: Meu aparelho de barbear caiu na pia.
translations.vi: Dao cạo râu của tôi rơi vào bồn rửa.
translations.nl: Mijn scheermes is in de wastafel gevallen.
translations.hi: मेरा रेज़र सिंक में गिर गया.
translations.pl: Moja maszynka do golenia wpadła do umywalki.
translations.el: Το ξυραφάκι μου έπεσε στον νιπτήρα.
translations.nb: Barberhøvelen min falt ned i vasken.
translations.sv: Min rakhyvel föll ner i handfatet.
translations.ro: Aparatul meu de ras a căzut în chiuvetă.
translations.cs: Můj holicí strojek spadl do umyvadla.
translations.da: Min barberskraber faldt ned i vasken.
translations.ja: 私のカミソリが洗面台に落ちた。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular possessive determiner; agrees in gender/number with the noun (masculine singular here) and modifies ‘rasoir’.
Common count noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; used with an intransitive verb to form the passé composé.
Past participle; forms the passé composé with ‘être’; agrees in gender/number with the subject (masculine singular here).
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Noun with elided definite article (l’ = le) before vowel-initial noun ‘évier’; functions as the object of the preposition.

sentences.target: J'ai oublié mon rasoir chez toi.

translations.fr: J'ai oublié mon rasoir chez toi.
translations.en: I forgot my razor at your place.
translations.es: Olvidé mi maquinilla de afeitar en tu casa.
translations.de: Ich habe meinen Rasierer bei dir vergessen.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato il mio rasoio a casa tua.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把剃须刀落在你家了。
translations.yue: 我喺你屋企漏低咗把剃鬚刀。
translations.ru: Я забыл свою бритву у тебя.
translations.pt: Esqueci meu aparelho de barbear na sua casa.
translations.he: שכחתי את סכין הגילוח שלי אצלך.
translations.vi: Tôi quên dao cạo râu ở nhà bạn.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn scheermes bij jou vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув свою бритву у тебе.
translations.hi: मैं अपना रेज़र तुम्हारे घर भूल गया.
translations.pl: Zostawiłem u ciebie maszynkę do golenia.
translations.el: Ξέχασα το ξυραφάκι μου στο σπίτι σου.
translations.nb: Jeg glemte barberhøvelen min hos deg.
translations.id: Aku lupa pisau cukurku di rumahmu.
translations.sv: Jag glömde min rakhyvel hemma hos dig.
translations.ro: Mi-am uitat aparatul de ras la tine.
translations.cs: Zapomněl jsem si u tebe holicí strojek.
translations.da: Jeg glemte min barberskraber hjemme hos dig.
translations.ja: あなたの家にカミソリを忘れた。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided to ‘j’ + auxiliary ‘avoir’, 1st person singular present; forms the passé composé.
Past participle; with ‘avoir’ it normally shows no agreement unless a preceding direct object triggers it; here it heads the compound verb.
1st-person singular possessive determiner; masculine singular, modifying ‘rasoir’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb phrase.
Preposition indicating location at someone’s place.
Stressed (disjunctive) 2nd-person singular pronoun; object of the preposition ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Tu nettoies le rasoir après la douche.
sentences.reading: /ty nɛ.twa lə ʁa.zwaʁ a.pʁɛ la duʃ/

translations.fr: Tu nettoies le rasoir après la douche.
translations.ipa: /ty nɛ.twa lə ʁa.zwaʁ a.pʁɛ la duʃ/
translations.en: You clean the razor after the shower.
translations.es: Limpias la maquinilla de afeitar después de la ducha.
translations.de: Du reinigst den Rasierer nach dem Duschen.
translations.it: Pulisci il rasoio dopo la doccia.
translations.zh-Hans: 你洗澡后把剃须刀洗干净。
translations.yue: 你沖完涼之後清潔剃鬚刀。
translations.pt: Você limpa o aparelho de barbear depois do banho.
translations.he: אתה מנקה את סכין הגילוח אחרי המקלחת.
translations.vi: Bạn vệ sinh dao cạo râu sau khi tắm.
translations.ar: أنت تنظف شفرة الحلاقة بعد الاستحمام.
translations.nl: Je maakt het scheermes schoon na het douchen.
translations.hi: तुम नहाने के बाद रेज़र साफ करते हो.
translations.pl: Czyścisz maszynkę do golenia po prysznicu.
translations.el: Καθαρίζεις το ξυραφάκι μετά το ντους.
translations.id: Kamu membersihkan pisau cukur setelah mandi.
translations.ro: Cureți aparatul de ras după duș.
translations.ja: あなたはシャワーの後にカミソリを洗う。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; denotes habitual or current action.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘rasoir’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘nettoies’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces ‘douche’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘après’.

translations.es: Hoy compramos una maquinilla de afeitar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天买一把剃须刀。
translations.pt: Hoje vamos comprar um aparelho de barbear.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta mua một cái dao cạo râu.
translations.hi: हम आज एक रेज़र खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper en barberhøvel i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kita membeli pisau cukur.
translations.sv: Vi köper en rakhyvel i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi cumpărăm un aparat de ras.
translations.da: Vi køber en barberskraber i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はカミソリを買う。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular, often meaning ‘we’ in speech.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; stem vowel alternation (è) in this form.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a new, non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘achète’.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
